title: Create: Teleporters Remastered
description: A retexture and remodeling of some of the Create: Teleporters blocks and items
body:
Just redid some of the textures and models - Might have some changes in the future more

When Using this Resource Make sure you have Create , GeckoLib and Create : Teleporters!


Thanks for dcchill (The Owner of Create: Teleporters) for allowing me to post the pack.

## Curseforge Version

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-teleporters-remastered](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-teleporters-remastered)


If you find any issues please contact me on discord : ItsLiterallyRen
